name: Agent Identity Pattern
summary: Treat each agent's identity (purpose, role, persona, scope) as a versioned artifact — the equivalent of a job description — written before any prompts or code, not implicit in scattered prompt fragments.
rejected_reason: Process/meta framework about how engineering teams describe, rate, spec, onboard, or design agents — not an AI agent pattern the agent itself uses, exhibits, or is architecturally. Catalog scope is patterns of agent behavior and architecture, not patterns of how humans work with patterns. Surfaced from Bornet et al. Agentic AI book (2025) but reclassified as out-of-scope per Marco's 2026-05-23 audit.
